---
title: "Living Through Data"
subtitle: "Thoughts about data and machines and how to use them"
description: "Articles about data science, artificial intelligence, machine learning and other topics that interest me."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, author, title, categories, description]
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: true
date-format: DD MMM, YYYY
comments: false
---
